theme_and_archetype.reasoning: The 'cabin in the woods' and 'lantern glow' requirements call for a moody, grounded, warm environment. It bridges Organic/Earthy aesthetics with a deep cinematic lighting approach (Luxury principles) to feel cozy, not clinical or childish.

rules: No generic sans-serifs for headings. Use the designated serif.
Headlines (Jar title, Drawer headers) must use tight tracking.
Subtitles and labels use wide tracking and uppercase.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. The jar needs breathing room to feel like a hero object. Panels should feel structured and tactile.

bento_rules.mobile: Single column. Jar first, then Add Task, then Today list, then Drawer.
bento_rules.desktop: Two-column grid (grid-cols-12 gap-12). Left column (col-span-5) is the environment holding the Jar, Progress, and Reward field. Right column (col-span-7) holds the Parchment panels for Add Task, Today List, and Task Drawer.

jar.architecture: Must be pure CSS or SVG + Glassmorphism. Do not use an image.
styles: Shape: A main rectangular body with rounded bottom corners (rounded-b-3xl), topped with a narrower 'neck' (rounded-t-sm).
Borders: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2) on the left/top, 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05) on right/bottom to simulate light reflection.
Shadow: Inner shadow (box-shadow: inset 20px 0 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), inset -10px 0 20px rgba(255,255,255,0.1)) to give glass volume.
Highlight: A pure white vertical gradient sliver (w-1 or w-2) running down the left side at 10% opacity.
jar.internal_layout: flex flex-col-reverse items-center justify-start overflow-hidden. Use gap-1 and p-2.

styles: Texture: Use the category radial gradients to make them look spherical/3D.
Shadow: drop-shadow-md to give depth against other poms.
Size: w-4 h-4 or w-5 h-5 (fluid based on jar capacity). Since it needs to hold 400, they must pack densely. Flex wrap with gap-0.5 is ideal.
poms.stratification_logic: Group poms by category color. Sort groups by size (largest group at the bottom). When rendering, map them inside a flex container with flex-wrap-reverse or flex-col-reverse.

styles: Shadow: shadow-xl (dark ambient shadow from the environment).
Typography: Dark brown/grey text for high contrast.
Border: bottom border border-[#EAE3D5] on all but last item.

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-[#3F332D] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.icon: text-[#8A7E78] hover:text-[#3F332D] p-1.5 transition-colors rounded-md hover:bg-[#EAE3D5]

inputs.styles: bg-transparent border-b-2 border-[#EAE3D5] focus:border-[#3F332D] outline-none py-2 text-lg text-[#3F332D] placeholder:text-[#8A7E78] transition-colors

reward_field.styles: text-center bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 text-white/90 text-2xl font-serif py-2 w-full max-w-xs focus:border-white/50 outline-none placeholder:text-white/30

pom_drop.animation: Framer Motion. Pom spawns at top of the Jar (y: -50, opacity: 0), falls to its designated flex position (layout animation), and has a slight spring bounce (type: 'spring', stiffness: 200, damping: 15).
pom_drop.constraint: The JAR itself must NOT bounce or shake. Only the Pom moves.

task_complete.animation: Task row strikes through, fades out (opacity: 0, x: 20), then shrinks height to 0.

drawer_toggle.animation: Framer Motion AnimatePresence. Height scales from 0 to auto, opacity 0 to 1. Feels like sliding open.

jar_celebration.animation: Jar gets a strong drop-shadow glow (box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.6)). A celebratory 'Parchment Card' modal scales in (scale: 0.9 to 1) with Confetti or a subtle CSS particle effect.

data_and_state.architecture: React Context or Zustand for state management. Persist to localStorage.
schema: poms: array of completed task objects or just category strings, max length 400.

wood_background.description: Dark wood grain texture. Use as a fixed, cover background image.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use framer-motion for the Pom drop and layout animations.
Implement the background by layering the wood image, a black overlay, and the radial lantern glow.
Build the Jar using HTML divs and CSS Glassmorphism strictly following the provided borders and inner shadow.
The 400 Poms should be mapped inside the Jar. Calculate their counts, group them by category size (largest count first), and render them in a dense flex-wrap container.
Do NOT bounce the entire Jar. Only animate the incoming poms.
Implement the Data/State purely with local storage. No backend required.
